msg: Run git diff HEAD~5 --stat and analyze which areas of the codebase changed most. Identify patterns.

        "text": "Here's the breakdown:\n\n**5 commits, 8 files changed (71 ins / 139 del)**\n\n| Area | Files | Net | What happened |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| **Cortex / message relay** | `gateway-bridge.ts`, `loop.ts`, `chat.ts` | +63 | Biggest growth — hardening ops-trigger so task results flow through Cortex correctly |\n| **Config hygiene** | `openclaw.json` | −98 | Untracked from git (was getting wiped on checkout) |\n| **Workspace cleanup** | `_check_db.mjs`, `TOOLS.md`, `ACTIVE-ISSUES.md` | −18 | Removed temp debug script, updated docs |\n| **Rebuild infra** | `rebuild.ps1` | +1 | Fixed wake-up to use `--system-event` |\n\n**Patterns:**\n\n1. **Ops-trigger reliability** — 3 of 5 commits fix the same pipeline: ensuring sub-agent task results actually reach the user via Cortex instead of silently dropping.
